notice: This seed database mixes verified public contacts with role-level placeholders where exact local officers depend on the road-owning agency, ward, and latest postings. Always verify before sending sensitive complaints.

sources.label: UP Chief Minister Office key contacts
sources.usedFor: Chief Minister Office email and senior CMO contact numbers

sources.label: Lucknow Nagar Nigam contact page
sources.usedFor: Lucknow municipal control room, WhatsApp/calling numbers, email, address

sources.label: Lucknow district directory
sources.usedFor: District Magistrate Lucknow email and mobile

sources.label: Lucknow district telephone directory
sources.usedFor: Current names and phones for DM Lucknow and Nagar Ayukt Lucknow

sources.label: UP PWD GIS/Nigrani portal
sources.usedFor: PWD headquarters address, phone, and pothole feedback app reference

sources.label: UP Legislative Assembly council of ministers
sources.usedFor: Official council-of-ministers listing; retained as a cross-check because public PWD portfolio data is inconsistent

sources.label: 2026 UP portfolio reporting
sources.usedFor: May 2026 reporting that the Chief Minister retained PWD after the latest allocation

issueTypes.label: Road or pothole
issueTypes.hint: Road ownership may be municipal, PWD, development authority, expressway authority, or NHAI.

issueTypes.label: Streetlight
issueTypes.hint: Usually municipal body or local electricity/maintenance contractor depending on city.

issueTypes.label: Sanitation or garbage
issueTypes.hint: Usually urban local body in municipal areas; panchayat/block in rural areas.

issueTypes.label: Water supply
issueTypes.hint: Handled by local body, Jal Nigam, or Jal Sansthan depending on location.

lmc-chief-engineer-role.name: Chief Engineer, Lucknow Nagar Nigam
lmc-chief-engineer-role.title: Chief Engineer

contact.address: Lucknow Municipal Corporation, Triloki Nath Road, Lalbagh, Lucknow

lmc-chief-engineer-role.note: Name/posting needs live verification from LMC engineering directory.

lmc-municipal-commissioner-role.name: Shri Gaurav Kumar, IAS
lmc-municipal-commissioner-role.title: Nagar Ayukt (Municipal Commissioner), Lucknow

contact.address: Nagar Nigam H.Q, Lalbagh, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh

lmc-municipal-commissioner-role.note: Name and phone from Lucknow district telephone directory; email from Lucknow Nagar Nigam contact page.

contact.address: Room No. 49, Office of the District Magistrate, Qaisar Bagh, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh-226001

pwd-headquarters.name: Public Works Department Headquarters
pwd-headquarters.title: PWD headquarters / pothole feedback intake
pwd-headquarters.office: Public Works Department, Government of Uttar Pradesh

contact.address: 96, Mahatma Gandhi Marg, Raj Bhavan Colony, The Mall Avenue, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh 226001

pwd-headquarters.note: UP PWD portal also advertises the Nigrani pothole feedback and inspection Android app.

pwd-local-engineer-role.name: Executive Engineer, PWD division for the road
pwd-local-engineer-role.title: Executive Engineer

contact.address: Use district/division directory after road ownership is confirmed

pwd-local-engineer-role.note: Exact division depends on road class and location.

contact.address: Confirm from latest PWD circle directory

pwd-engineer-in-chief-role.name: Engineer-in-Chief / HOD, PWD Uttar Pradesh
pwd-engineer-in-chief-role.title: Engineer-in-Chief / Head of Department

contact.address: PWD headquarters, 96 Mahatma Gandhi Marg, Lucknow

pwd-engineer-in-chief-role.note: Exact incumbent name should be verified from latest PWD establishment order or directory before addressing by name.

cm-yogi.name: Yogi Adityanath
cm-yogi.title: Chief Minister; PWD portfolio status needs current notification check
cm-yogi.note: CMO contact is official. PWD portfolio is conflicting in public sources: the Assembly page lists Jitin Prasad for PWD, while May 2026 reporting says the CM retained PWD after the cabinet expansion.

lucknow-municipal-road.label: Municipal road or pothole in Lucknow
lucknow-municipal-road.ownershipTest: If the road is inside municipal limits and not a national/state highway, start with Nagar Nigam.

lucknow-municipal-civic.label: Municipal civic issue in Lucknow
lucknow-municipal-civic.ownershipTest: Municipal services such as sanitation, streetlights, and local drains generally begin with the urban local body.

up-pwd-road.label: PWD/state road issue
up-pwd-road.ownershipTest: Use this chain for state highways, major district roads, and rural roads maintained by PWD; national highways go to NHAI.

district-administration.label: District administration escalation
district-administration.ownershipTest: Use when the exact department is unclear or the issue crosses local bodies.
